personal.name: Arjun Mehta
personal.title: Senior Backend Engineer | Node.js, Distributed Systems & Scalable SaaS
personal.tagline: I design and ship backend systems that stay fast, reliable, and observable as they grow.

about.intro: I'm a backend-focused full-stack engineer with 6+ years of experience shipping scalable, secure, and maintainable systems in production. My work sits at the intersection of system design, performance engineering, and developer experience.
focus: Architecting distributed systems that handle high load and failure gracefully
Designing clean, versioned, and well-documented APIs that are easy to integrate
Optimizing databases and queries for real-world traffic patterns
Building platforms that can scale from MVP to 100K+ users without rewrites
Creating robust observability so issues are detected before users notice
about.ownership: I don't just implement endpoints; I own the lifecycle of backend systems from design and implementation to monitoring, scaling, and iteration.
principles: Clean architecture over quick hacks, even under deadlines
Scalability and reliability designed in from day one
Observability (logs, metrics, tracing) as a first-class requirement
Security, correctness, and performance as non-negotiable features

experience.title: Senior Backend Engineer
experience.description: Led backend architecture for scalable SaaS platform serving 100K+ users

experience.description: Built core backend systems and APIs from scratch
